properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Weak and wounded sinner Lost and left to die Oh, raise your head for Love is passing by Come to Jesus Come to Jesus Come to Jesus and live

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now your burden's lifted And carried far away And precious blood has washed away the stain So, sing to Jesus Sing to Jesus Sing to Jesus and live

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And like a newborn baby Don't be afraid to crawl And remember when you walk sometimes we fall So, fall on Jesus Fall on Jesus Fall on Jesus and live

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes the way is lonely And steep and filled with pain So if your sky is dark and pours the rain Then cry to Jesus Cry to Jesus Cry to Jesus and live

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh and when the love splills over And music fills the night And when you can't contain your joy inside Then dance for Jesus Dance for Jesus Dance for Jesus and live

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: With your final heartbeat Kiss the world goodbye Then go in peace, and laugh on Glory's side And fly to Jesus Fly to Jesus Fly to Jesus and live

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Fly to Jesus Fly to Jesus Fly to Jesus and live
